channel.title: 2024-08 on Kaya Log
channel.description: Recent content in 2024-08 on Kaya Log

item.title: Protein interaction analysis; between SARS-CoV-2 virus and human
item.description:
Protein interaction analysis; between SARS-CoV-2 virus and human #

Human ppi network #

Network лЛ§мЪіл°ЬлУЬ

STRING dbмЧР м†СмЖНнХімДЬ downloadл•Љ мД†нГЭнХШк≥†, organism of interestмЧР homo sapiensл•Љ мЮЕл†•нХім§АлЛ§.

мЭім§СмЧР protein.links.full.v12.0.txt.gzл•Љ лЛ§мЪіл∞ЫмХДм§АлЛ§.

cf) Subscore мЭШлѓЄ https://string-db.org/cgi/info?sessionId=bEKyfCQ15Bqb&footer_active_subpage=scores

The basic principle

  • In STRING, each protein-protein interaction is annotated with one or more ‘scores’.
  • Importantly, these scores do not indicate the strength or the specificity of the interaction. Instead, they are indicators of confidence, i.e. how likely STRING judges an interaction to be true, given the available evidence. All scores rank from 0 to 1, with 1 being the highest possible confidence. A score of 0.5 would indicate that roughly every second interaction might be erroneous (i.e., a false positive).

Transfer scores

item.title: GISAID; Download Influenza virus genome sequence from GISAID database
item.description:
GISAID; Download Influenza virus genome sequence from GISAID database #

2024.10.19 #
#code #genomics #

Step 1. Download influenza genome #

GISAID(https://gisaid.org/)мЧР л°ЬкЈЄмЭЄнХімДЬ Epiflu databaseмЧР м†СмЖНнХЬлЛ§.

м∞Єк≥†л°Ь Epiflu databaseлКФ Epicov, EpiRSVмЩА к∞ЩмЭА лЛ§л•Є dbмЩА лЛђл¶ђ м†СкЈЉ мКємЭЄмЭД л∞ЫмХДмХЉ м†СмЖНнХ†мИШ мЮИлЛ§.

м†СмЖНнЦИлЛ§л©і Search & BrowseмЧР лУ§мЦік∞АмДЬ мЫРнХШлКФ м°∞к±імЭД мД†нГЭнХім§АлЛ§.

мЭілХМ

  • Hostл•Љ humanмЬЉл°Ь мД§м†ХнХШл©і humanмЧРмДЬ мЦїмЭА virus sequenceлУ§мЭД мЦїмЭДмИШмЮИлЛ§.
  • Required Segmentл•Љ мД§м†ХнХім£Љк≥† only completeл°Ь мД§м†ХнХім£Љл©і 8к∞Ь segment лН∞мЭінД∞к∞А л™®лСР м°імЮђнХШлКФ лН∞мЭінД∞мЕЛмЭШ sequenceлІМ л≥ЉмИШмЮИлЛ§.

мД†нГЭнЦИлЛ§л©і searchл•Љ нБіл¶≠нХім§АлЛ§.
